title: Explore Microsoft Dev Box and improve developer productivity
summary: This learning path provides a comprehensive introduction to Microsoft Dev Box, covering core service fundamentals, deployment best practices, key customization and imaging features, and guidance for using and optimizing your experience in the developer portal.

sections.title: Explore Microsoft Dev Box and improve developer productivity
sections.summary: This learning path provides a comprehensive introduction to Microsoft Dev Box, covering core service fundamentals, deployment best practices, key customization and imaging features, and guidance for using and optimizing your experience in the developer portal.

lessons.title: Understand the basics of Microsoft Dev Box
lessons.content_md:
This module discusses the fundamentals of the Microsoft dev Box, its key concepts, and architecture.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/understand-basics-microsoft-dev-box/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Understand the basics of Microsoft Dev Box

lessons.title: Explore Microsoft Dev Box deployment guidelines and best practices
lessons.content_md:
This module describes the details and the best practices for deploying Microsoft Dev Box in your organization.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/explore-microsoft-dev-box-deployment-guidelines-best-practices/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Explore Microsoft Dev Box deployment guidelines and best practices

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Explore Microsoft Dev Box and improve developer productivity
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Explore Microsoft Dev Box and improve developer productivity**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
